# SoftDeletable <kbd>Type</kbd>

> Adds soft-delete capability to a model.
> 
> Soft-deleted records are excluded from default queries via
> access policies. The `deletedAt` timestamp is used for
> data retention compliance — records older than the
> configured retention window are permanently purged by a
> background job.

**Defined in:** `mixins.zmodel`

<details>
<summary>Declaration · <code>mixins.zmodel</code></summary>

```prisma
type SoftDeletable {
    deletedAt DateTime?
    deletedBy String?
}
```

</details>

| <a id="field-deletedAt"></a>`deletedAt` | `DateTime?` | No | — | — | When the record was soft-deleted, or null if active. |
| <a id="field-deletedBy"></a>`deletedBy` | `String?` | No | — | — | The ID of the user who performed the deletion, for audit purposes. |
